title: bupleurum longifolium subsp. aureum
intro: Bupleurum longifolium subsp. aureum, also known as Goldthread, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, characterized by its bright yellow roots and leaves. Traditionally, Goldthread has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum longifolium subsp. aureum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Goldthread can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a range of applications.
